complete-your-profile: Mezue profaịlụ gị maka ahụmịhe ka mma
auth-dialog-content: A na-atụgharị gị gaa na nbanye jikọtara ọnụ na Meta-Wiki
body-home-section01-description: Zute ndi ọzọ, mụta, ma kesaa nka n'elu ikpo okwu emere maka ndi Wikimedia Movement.
body-home-section01-description-unified-: N'ebe a, anyị na-eji Wikimedia gị jikọtara ọnụ iji jikọọ gị na ndị ọzọ site na ozi Meta-Wiki. I nwekwara ike itinye {{CapacityExchange}} iji gosipụta akụkụ nke profaịlụ CapX gị na ibe Meta gị.
body-home-main-section-carrousel-descrip: Kesaa banyere ọrụ mmetụta zuru ụwa ọnụ.
body-home-section01-call-to-action-title: Mepụta ma kesaa ihe inwere ike ikụzi
body-home-section01-call-to-action-descr: Malite njem gị gaa n'ọkwa ọzọ dịka onye Wikimedia.
body-home-video-section-title: Olee otú e si mepụta CapX?
body-loggedin-home-main-section-descript: Ọ dị mma inwe gị ebe a
body-loggedin-home-third-section-descrip: Kọrọ anyị echiche gị, nkọwa gị, ma ọ bụ aro gị.
body-profile-section-affiliation-dropdow: Họrọ nzukọ gị site na menu ndọpụta.
profiency-level-almost-native: Ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ amaala
organization-profile-event-start-date-to: Tinye ụbọchị mmalite nke ihe omume gị. A ga-etinye oge na UTC (Oge zuru ụwa ọnụ nke a haziri).
organization-profile-event-end-date-tool: Tinye ụbọchị njedebe nke ihe omume gị. A ga-etinye oge na UTC (Oge zuru ụwa ọnụ nke a haziri).
organization-profile-event-description-t: Kọwaa ihe omume gị n'ụzọ dị mkpirikpi. I nwere ike itinye ihe mgbaru ọsọ ya, ndị metụtara ya, na isiokwu ndị dị mkpa gbasara ya.
organization-profile-provide-meta-link: Nye njikọ Meta-Wiki na akụkọ ihe omume gị.
footer-message: Maka na site na mmegharị Wikimedia
body-profile-copy-link-success: Njikọ profaịlụ e depụtaghachiri na clipboard!
body-profile-qr-code-hint: Nyochaa koodu a iji mepee profaịlụ a na ihe nchọgharị.
body-profile-choose-skills: Họrọ nkà ị nwere iji kerịta site na ikike ị maara.
video-fallback-message: Ihe nchọgharị gị anaghị akwado mkpado vidiyo. Biko jiri ihe nchọgharị nke oge a lelee vidiyo a.
aria-label-open-video: Pịa iji mepee ihe ọkpụkpọ vidiyo
edit-profile-choose-avatar-tooltip: Họrọ avatar ị ga-egosi na profaịlụ CapX gị, kama onyonyo ihe Wikidata gị (ọ bụrụ na ọ dị).
edit-profile-use-wikidata-photograph: Gosi foto Wikidata m na profaịlụ
edit-profile-use-wikidata-item: Gosi ihe Wikidata m na profaịlụ
edit-profile-consent-wikidata-before-lin: Site na ịpị ebe a, ekwenyere m ka e gosipụta onyonyo ihe Wikidata m na profaịlụ CapX m. Ngwaọrụ a ga-achọ na Wikidata maka QID metụtara aha njirimara gị ma gosi ya ma ọ bụrụ na achọtara ya. Iji nwee ihe na Wikidata, mmadụ ga-emerịrị $1 .
edit-profile-mini-bio-placeholder: Dee nkọwa dị mkpirikpi banyere onwe gị.
edit-profile-mini-bio-tooltip: Gwa ndị ọgbọ gị obere ihe gbasara onwe gị. Gịnị ka i chere ga-amasị gị ịkọrọ? Kedụ ihe ndị dị mkpa mere na njem Wikimedia gị?
edit-profile-mini-bio-language-tooltip: Họrọ asụsụ e ji dee obere ihe gbasara ndụ gị.
edit-profile-select-skills: Họrọ nkà ị nwere site na Capacity Directory. Gbalịa ịhọrọ ndị a kapịrị ọnụ.
edit-profile-available-capacities: Site na ikike gị ị maara, họrọ ndị ị nwere ị ga-ekerịta.
edit-profile-wanted-capacities: Họrọ nkà ị dị njikere ịmụta site na Capacity Directory. Gbalịa họrọ ndị kacha pụta ìhè.
edit-profile-language-tooltip: Biko depụta asụsụ ndị ị nwere ike iji jikọọ.
edit-profile-enter-diff-tags: Tinye akara Diff metụtara nzukọ gị.
edit-profile-display-events: Gosipụta ihe omume ndị bụ isi nke nzukọ gị. Kesaa ruo njikọ Wikimedia anọ na njikọ onyonyo ha na Commons.
edit-profile-share-documents-tooltop: I nwere ike ịkekọrịta ruo njikọ anọ nke akwụkwọ nzukọ gị site na Wikimedia Commons.
edit-profile-share-username: Kesaa aha njirimara Wikimedia ọzọ ma ọ bụrụ na ị nwere otu.
edit-profile-territory: Gwa ebe ị nọ site na mpaghara ma ọ bụ mba.
edit-profile-display-links: Mee ka obodo mara ihe nzukọ gị na-arụ ọrụ na ya. Kesaa ihe ruru njikọ Wikimedia anọ na foto ndị yiri ya na Commons.
edit-profile-consent-wikidata-item-befor: Site na ịpị ebe a, ekwenyere m ka ihe Wikidata m gosipụta na profaịlụ CapX m. Ngwaọrụ a ga-achọ na Wikidata maka QID metụtara aha njirimara gị ma gosi ya ma ọ bụrụ na achọtara ya. Iji nwee ihe na Wikidata, mmadụ ga-emerịrị $1 .
edit-profile-wikimedia-projects: Tinye ọrụ Wikimedia ị nwere mmasị na ya.
edit-profile-delete-profile-cancel: Mba, achọrọ m idobe profaịlụ CapX m
capacity-card-added-to-wanted: ✓ A gbakwunyere ya na Ihe A Na-achọ
capacity-added-known: Ikike agbakwunyere na nke a maara
capacity-added-wanted: Ikike agbakwunyere na nke a chọrọ
capacity-card-profile-info: A ga-agbakwunye nke a na profaịlụ nkeonwe gị.
capacity-card-org-profile-info: Iji gbakwunye ikike na profaịlụ nzukọ, biko gaa na peeji nhazi profaịlụ nke nzukọ.
privacy-policy-capacity-exchange-text: Saịtị a bụ ọrụ mba ụwa nke $1 na-ahazi ugbu a. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ na Wikimedia Cloud Services, ọkachasị na $2 , ya mere ọ na-adabere na $3 , na-eji obere ozi nkeonwe eme ihe. Ihe niile dị na ya bụ CC-BY-SA. A na-anabata onyinye koodu.
privacy-policy-link-cloud-service-terms-: Usoro ojiji nke Ọrụ Igwe Ojii
privacy-policy-private-information-intro: Saịtị a na-ejigide ozi nzuzo ndị a:
privacy-policy-private-information-topic: Maka ndị debanyere aha na ndị ọrụ: $ 1 asambodo nke na-enye ohere ịnweta akaụntụ Wikimedia gị;
Obere akụkọ ndụ gị, nke onwe gị dere na profaịlụ gị na ebumnuche nke ikpughe ozi na-adọrọ mmasị na nke dị mkpa banyere njem Wikimedia gị. Ọ bụ nhọrọ ma nwee ike ịhapụ ya n'efu ma ọ bụrụ na ị họrọ.
privacy-policy-private-information-text0: Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ, ị nwere ike iwepụ ozi gbasara onwe gị site na ịpị bọtịnụ uhie "Hichapụ profaịlụ" na ibe nhazi profaịlụ onye ọrụ.

Ọ bụrụ na ị bụ onye njikwa nke otu nzukọ ma nwee ikike idezi profaịlụ ya, ị nwere ike ihichapụ data ya site na idezi profaịlụ nke otu ahụ ma hapụ ubi niile oghere. Iji wepụ ya n'ọrụ nke onye njikwa profaịlụ, ị nwere ike izipu ndị otu ozi ịntanetị. Ozugbo enweghị onye ejikọtara dị ka onye njikwa, a gaghịzi egosi profaịlụ ahụ na ndepụta nke otu.
Ojiji na njigide data na-achịkwa $ 1. Ngwá ọrụ a na-agbaso GPDR.
capacity-selection-modal-no-capacities-f: Achọtaghị ikike ọ bụla maka otu a
capacity-selection-modal-hover-view-capa: Pịa ka ị hụ ya na Capacity Feed
privacy-policy-private-information-text0: Usoro ojiji nke Wikimedia Cloud Service
feed-no-data-description: Gbalịa ịgbanwe ihe nzacha ahụ ma ọ bụ laghachi ma emechaa
profile-incomplete-description: Òtù a akọwabeghị ikike o nwere ma ọ bụ ikike ọ chọrọ.
profile-incomplete-popup-description: Ihe dị mkpa gbasara profaịlụ gị enweghị ya. Biko tinye ókèala gị, asụsụ gị, na ikike ị maara iji nyere ndị ọzọ aka ịchọta gị.
snackbar-edit-profile-failed-generic: Nsogbu na mmelite profaịlụ. Biko lelee data gị wee nwaa ọzọ.
snackbar-capacity-validation-available-w: A ga-ahọrọ ikike dịnụ site na ikike ị maara. Biko tinye ikike ahụ na nkà ị maara nke ọma.
snackbar-capacity-validation-conflict: E nwere esemokwu na nhọrọ ikike gị. Biko hụ na e dekwara ikike niile dị na ya dị ka ikike a maara.
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-delet: Nsogbu ihichapụ ihe omume. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
Ehichapụrụ ihe omume ahụ nke ọma
Nsogbu ihichapụ ọrụ ahụ. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-updat: Nsogbu na mmelite ihe omume. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-creat: Nsogbu gbasara ịmepụta ihe omume. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-max-d: Oke akwụkwọ anọ ka enyere maka otu nzukọ. Ị nwere akwụkwọ anọ.
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-max-p: Oke ọrụ anọ ka enyere maka otu nzukọ. I nwere ọrụ anọ.
snackbar-edit-profile-organization-fetch: Nsogbu ịchọta mkpado. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
snackbar-submit-report-bug-failed-generi: Nsogbu na mmelite ihe omume. Biko lelee ma nwaa ọzọ
snackbar-submit-report-bug-success-title: Ekele dịrị gị! Ugbu a, ị nwere ike ịhụ ọganihu ya na taabụ 'Nnyefe'.
saved-profiles-delete-success: Ewepụrụ profaịlụ na ndepụta echekwara gị nke ọma.
saved-profiles-add-success: Echekwara profaịlụ na ndepụta gị nke ọma.
snackbar-submit-message-success-title: Ekele dịrị gị! Ugbu a, ị nwere ike ịhụ ozi ezitere gị na taabụ 'Ezitere'.
edit-profile-organization-logo-help: Tinye njikọ onyonyo Wikimedia Commons, dịka ọmụmaatụ https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Example.jpg
events-search-results-no-results: Achọtaghị ihe ọ bụla maka ọchụchọ gị.
events-no-results-with-filters: Ọ dịghị ihe omume dabara na nzacha ahọpụtara. Gbalịa iwepụ ụfọdụ nzacha.
events-search-results-error: Nsogbu na-ibupute ihe omume. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
report-bug-alt-banner: Ibe nsogbu gbasara akụkọ onyonyo ọkọlọtọ
report-bug-description-informative-text: Biko kọwaa nje ma ọ bụ nsogbu ị zutere. Gbalịa ịkọwa ihe dịka o kwere mee.
report-bug-types-of-reports-informative-: Họrọ ụdị akụkọ ị na-emepụta. Ị nwere ike ịkọ nsogbu (mmejọ), tụpụta ịmepụta atụmatụ ọhụrụ, ma ọ bụ tụpụta mmezi ụfọdụ.
message-form-to-placeholder: Ònye ka ọ bụ maka ya?
message-form-method-informative-text: A ga-eziga ozi a site na Meta-Wiki.
message-form-subject-placeholder: Nyere m aka ịhazi mmefu ego ọrụ m
message-form-subject-informative-text: Kpọkọta ozi gị n'okwu ole na ole. Isiokwu doro anya na-eme ka ohere nke ịza ngwa ngwa dịkwuo elu.
message-form-email-not-available: Ozi ịntanetị adịghị. A ga-eji ibe mkparịta ụka kama.
message-form-email-receiver-not-emailabl: Onye ọrụ a enweghị ike ịnata ozi ịntanetị. A ga-eji peeji okwu mee ihe kama.
message-form-email-sender-not-configured: Ozi ịntanetị adịghị. Ịkwesịrị ịhazi ozi email na mmasị Meta-Wiki gị.
message-form-user-checking: Nyocha onye ọrụ. Chere nwa oge.
message-form-user-not-found-message: Achọtaghị onye ọrụ. Nwaa aha njirimara ọzọ.
message-error-no-email-from-receiver-bod:
Onye nata anaghị anabata ozi ịntanetị site na Wikimedia. 

 Biko jiri peeji mkparịta ụka mee ihe kama.
message-info-popup-title: A ga-eziga ozi a site na Meta-Wiki.
lets-connect-edit-user-info-2: Ozi gị ana-echekwaghị ga-adị ebe a mgbe ị lọghachiri. Mgbe ahụ ị ga-echekwa mgbanwe niile site na ịpị bọtịnụ 'Chekwa Profaịlụ'.
error-fallback-description: Ọ dị anyị mwute, mana enwere njehie mgbe a na ebugharị ibe a. Biko nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
